question: How many tracks are there?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS track_count FROM track;

question: How many customers are there?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customer;

question: Which five artists have the most albums?
reference_sql: SELECT ar.name AS artist_name, COUNT(al.album_id) AS album_count FROM artist ar JOIN album al ON al.artist_id = ar.artist_id GROUP BY ar.artist_id, ar.name ORDER BY album_count DESC, artist_name ASC LIMIT 5;

question: Which five customers have spent the most?
reference_sql: SELECT c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS customer_name, SUM(i.total) AS total_spend FROM customer c JOIN invoice i ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name ORDER BY total_spend DESC, customer_name ASC LIMIT 5;

question: Which country generated the most revenue?
reference_sql: SELECT billing_country AS country, SUM(total) AS total_revenue FROM invoice GROUP BY billing_country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, country ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Which genre has sold the most tracks?
reference_sql: SELECT g.name AS genre_name, SUM(il.quantity) AS tracks_sold FROM genre g JOIN track t ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id JOIN invoice_line il ON il.track_id = t.track_id GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.name ORDER BY tracks_sold DESC, genre_name ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What was the total revenue by year?
reference_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM invoice_date)::integer AS year, SUM(total) AS total_revenue FROM invoice GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

question: Which employee supports the most customers?
reference_sql: SELECT e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee_name, COUNT(c.customer_id) AS customer_count FROM employee e JOIN customer c ON c.support_rep_id = e.employee_id GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name ORDER BY customer_count DESC, employee_name ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the longest track and who is its artist?
reference_sql: SELECT t.name AS track_name, ar.name AS artist_name, t.milliseconds FROM track t JOIN album al ON al.album_id = t.album_id JOIN artist ar ON ar.artist_id = al.artist_id ORDER BY t.milliseconds DESC, t.track_id ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Which five artists generated the most sales?
reference_sql: SELECT ar.name AS artist_name, SUM(il.unit_price * il.quantity) AS total_sales FROM artist ar JOIN album al ON al.artist_id = ar.artist_id JOIN track t ON t.album_id = al.album_id JOIN invoice_line il ON il.track_id = t.track_id GROUP BY ar.artist_id, ar.name ORDER BY total_sales DESC, artist_name ASC LIMIT 5;
